sum_of_debts: Sum of all debts and credits
no_activity: No activity yet. Start by adding a contact or an expense!
split_info: The expense will be divided equally among the checked people below
api_key_missing: Gemini API key not set. Go to Settings to configure it.
desc_get_dashboard: Retrieves total balance, total expenses owed and to be received. Call this for global overview.
desc_get_contacts: Retrieves full list of contacts, including names and database ID. Essential for creating an expense on someone else's behalf.
desc_get_categories: Retrieves list of all categories in the database to associate with an expense.
desc_get_groups: Returns saved groups. Useful if the user wants info on a specific trip or to associate an expense with a context.
desc_get_recent: Returns the last 20 recorded expenses, with title, amount, date, payer, and participants.
desc_add_expense: Adds and physically records a new expense. Use when requested to record/add an expense.
param_title: Short and summary title of the expense (e.g. "Dinner at Pizzeria").
param_category: Category ID. If you don't know, leave empty.
param_paid_by: ID of contact who paid. If unknown, use myContactId.
param_group: Optional group ID if expense is part of a group.
param_split: Array of UUIDs of contacts to split the expense equally.
system_instruction: You are the AI Assistant of Debt Manager. Your task is to help the user retrieve info on expenses or insert new transactions. Use tools in sequence, keep it concise.
error_missing_fields: Missing required fields: pass title, amount, paidById and splitParticipantIds array
amount_gt_zero: Amount must be greater than zero
delete_payment_confirm: Do you really want to delete this payment?
name: Name
delete_category_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
add_category_desc: Add a new category for your expenses.
delete_contact_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this contact?
add_contact_desc: Enter details for the new contact.
cross_group_debts: All simplified (cross-group) debts involving this contact.
title: Title
delete_expense_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?
add_expense_desc: Enter expense details and select how to split it.
select_at_least_one: Select at least one participant for the split
simplify_debts_desc: Optimize accounts between people to minimize the total number of transactions.
who_owes_who: Who owes who for this expense
who_owes_who_desc: View cost splits and mark a quick payment to close this receipt's debt. Payments are general.
all_paid_or_no_debts: All participants have already paid their share directly or there are no pending debts.
delete_group_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? All associated data might become orphaned.
add_group_desc: Create a group to split expenses among people.
select_participants: Select the people in the group.
choose_theme: Choose system theme or force it.
profile_desc: Link your profile to correctly manage your balances.
ai_desc: Configure Gemini for smart chat and receipt scanning.
p2p_desc: Share your database in real-time via WebRTC.
p2p_warning: Warning: synchronization will overwrite receiver data.
data_portability_desc: Manage data locally. Export backup or import.
confirm_delete_all: Are you REALLY sure? This will irrevocably delete all data.
ai_welcome: Hi! I am the AI assistant of Debt Manager.\n\nYou can ask me for a report of your expenses, who owes you money, or upload a receipt to let me add it automatically.
ai_not_configured: The AI Assistant is not yet configured.
ai_key_required: A free Google Gemini API key is required to use the chat and receipt analysis.
chat_placeholder: Describe a new expense or ask who owes you...
chat_disclaimer: Balance info and expenses are written exclusively to your local database.
select_profile_desc: Select which contact represents you to correctly calculate your debts and credits in the dashboard.
key_saved_locally: The key remains saved only on your device.
import_overwrite_confirm: The import will overwrite existing data. Continue?
reset_db_confirm: ARE YOU SURE? This action will PERMANENTLY delete all contacts, groups, and expenses.
remote_backup_received_confirm: You received a remote backup. Do you want to overwrite the current local database?
p2p_transfer_desc: Transfer the database between your devices instantly via network (without passing through cloud servers).
p2p_host_desc: Press the button below to generate a QR code or an ID. Enter it in the other device to send an exact copy of this database.
waiting_connection: Waiting for connection... (Scan the QR with another device to download data)
ai_gemini_desc: Configure the Google Gemini-based assistant to chat with your data or add expenses simply by sending a photo of the receipt.
receive_sync_desc: Enter the Sync ID generated by the other device (or press and use the camera to scan the QR) and receive the data.
